clips_used.title: Downtown Lexington - 4K AERIAL TOUR
clips_used.notes: The Mind of Jae, 200s, 4K — offset 40s (27+13) shows downtown Lexington aerial with the convention core visible on the left. Small corner watermark fully cropped by 25% zoom.

clips_used.title: Downtown Lexington from Above (4K)
clips_used.notes: Andrew Snook, 236s, 4K — offset 40s (27+13) shows downtown Lexington skyline approach from east, commercial buildings. NO watermarks at all.
